name: adult large breed lamb meal & brown rice recipe dog food
description: hill's science diet large breed adult dry dog food is specially formulated to fuel the energy needs of large breed dogs during the prime of their life. contains activbiome+ multi-benefit, a special blend of prebiotic fibers and antioxidants to support digestion, immune system and organ health healthy skin & coat with omega-6 & vitamin e lean muscles supported with high-quality protein support for healthy joints with natural sources of glucosamine and chondroitin healthy digestion supported by natural fibers
